nextSteps: For a new customer deployment, provision OAUTH_RELAY_URL, OAUTH_CONNECTION_ID, and OAUTH_RELAY_TOKEN through the VantaSoft OAuth Relay operator.
Keep legacy QUICKBOOKS_BROKER_* settings only until that connection is migrated through the controlled cutover.
Use standalone Intuit app credentials only on an owner-controlled backend or internal profile.
Reload MCP servers or restart the target Hermes gateway, then confirm the read-only QuickBooks tools are available.
